column8: Effect_size (natural log response ratio of mean inoculated plant mass over mean non-inoculated plant mass)
column9: Estimated_variance (inverse of summed replicates of inoculated and non-inoculated plants)
column10: N-fertilization (0=not fertilized with N, 1=fertilized with N)
column11: P-fertilization (0=not fertilized with P, 1=fertilized with P)
column12: Fertilization (N only, P only, neither, or both)
column15: InoculumComplexity (Single species, multiple species, or whole soil inoculum)
